Publications

Peer-reviewed articles, preprints, and conference papers.

// 2025

  • DFlee: An Agent-Based Model for Flood-Induced Population Displacement

    Harbach, L.M., Groen, D., Suleimenova, D., Jahani, A., Ghorbani, M., Xue, Y.

    Preprint — Research Square (2025)

    ABM Migration

  • Predicting Population Displacements after Earthquakes

    Jahani, A., Puma, M., Harbach, L.M., Groen, D.

    2025

    ABM

// 2024

  • A Conceptual Approach to Agent-Based Modelling of Coping Mechanisms in Climate-Driven Flooding in Bangladesh

    Harbach, L.M., Groen, D., Jahani, A., Suleimenova, D., Ghorbani, M., Xue, Y.

    International Conference on Computational Science (ICCS 2024)

    ABM Climate

  • On Qualitative Uncertainty in Modelling Assumptions

    Harbach, L.M., Groen, D.

    SSRN Preprint (2024)

    ABM SSRN →

// 2022

  • Space Weather-driven Variations in Lyα Absorption Signatures of Exoplanet Atmospheric Escape: MHD Simulations and the Case of AU Mic b

    Harbach, L.M., Cohen, O., Moschou, S.P., Garraffo, C., Fraschetti, F., Drake, J.J., Alvarado-Gómez, J.D.

    The Astrophysical Journal, 934(2), 189 (2022)

    Astrophysics MHD ApJ →

// 2021

  • Stellar Winds Drive Strong Variations in Exoplanet Evaporative Outflow Patterns and Transit Absorption Signatures

    Harbach, L.M., Moschou, S.P., Garraffo, C., Fraschetti, F., Alvarado-Gómez, J.D., Drake, J.J., Cohen, O.

    The Astrophysical Journal (2021)

    Astrophysics Stellar Winds ApJ →

Here you can find a list of my academic publications, including peer-reviewed journal articles and preprints, reflecting my research in astrophysics and socio-environmental modelling.

This section will be updated with a dynamic or manually curated list of publications.

Example Entry Format:
Author(s). (Year). “Title of Paper.” Journal Name, Volume(Issue), Pages. DOI.

Paper Title Number 3

Published in Journal 1, 2015

This paper is about the number 3. The number 4 is left for future work.

Recommended citation: Your Name, You. (2015). "Paper Title Number 3." Journal 1. 1(3). http://academicpages.github.io/files/paper3.pdf

This paper is about the number 2. The number 3 is left for future work.
